title: Senior Software Engineer - MagicBricks South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - MagicBricks South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MagicBricks South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
